task_completion.description: Verify that a survey titled 'Q4 2024 Post-Purchase Customer Satisfaction' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LimeSurvey dashboard, survey list, or survey settings page displays the survey title 'Q4 2024 Post-Purchase Customer Satisfaction'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a question group named 'Purchase Experience' is created and contains at least one question.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The survey structure menu or question editor shows a group named 'Purchase Experience' with at least one question listed under it.

task_completion.description: Verify that the survey participants table has been initialized (tokens enabled).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Survey participants' screen shows a table for participants rather than a prompt to 'Initialize participant table'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the four custom token attributes are defined.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Manage attributes' screen or the participant table columns show the four custom attributes: 'Customer Segment', 'Store Region', 'Loyalty Tier', and 'Annual Spend Bracket'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the eight participants are added with their respective emails and custom attribute values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Survey participants table lists the 8 participants (e.g., s.mitchell@globalretail.com, j.rodriguez@globalretail.com) and their corresponding custom attribute columns are populated with the correct values (e.g., Premium, Northeast, Gold, High for Sarah Mitchell).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the LimeSurvey web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LimeSurvey admin interface in a web browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the participant data was not just typed into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The participant data is seen within the LimeSurvey application, not in Notepad, gedit, or a similar text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the participants are actually in the LimeSurvey system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The participants are displayed in the official LimeSurvey 'Survey participants' data grid, not just in a CSV file viewed in a spreadsheet application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey Title: 'Q4 2024 Post-Purchase Customer Satisfaction'. Custom Attributes: 'Customer Segment', 'Store Region', 'Loyalty Tier', 'Annual Spend Bracket'. Participants to verify: s.mitchell@globalretail.com (Premium, Northeast, Gold, High); j.rodriguez@globalretail.com (Standard, Southeast, Silver, Medium); w.chen@globalretail.com (Premium, West, Gold, High); a.patel@globalretail.com (Budget, Midwest, Bronze, Low); m.thompson@globalretail.com (Standard, Northeast, Silver, Medium); e.kowalski@globalretail.com (Premium, Southeast, Gold, High); d.okafor@globalretail.com (Budget, West, Bronze, Low); l.nakamura@globalretail.com (Standard, Midwest, Silver, Medium).
